title: Verify local MLB origination is disabled in production mode
objective: Prove from current code and startup surfaces that local MLB trade origination is disabled by default in production mode and that bridge/model recommendations remain the only production entry path.
acceptance_criteria: env/config search result for ALLOW_LOCAL_MLB_ORIGINATION included
final result is VERIFIED, PARTIAL, or BLOCKED
rollback: Verification only unless a hard failure is proven.
